title: Custom eggless photo cakes for Marsden Park and Schofields families
summary:
Custom photo cakes. No eggs. 15 flavours. Pickup at Riverstone — Marsden Park, Schofields, Box Hill.

Num Nums Bakery opened at Riverstone Shopping Centre in December 2024. Photo cake add-on is $19.99. Sponge starts at $39.99 for a 6-inch, serving 6-8 people. Flavours include Rasmalai, Mango, and Ferrero Rocher — not the standard four.

100% eggless. Not some cakes. Every cake, every time. Jain and vegetarian families in Marsden Park don't need to check before ordering. That's the point.

48 hours minimum notice. Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725. Free parking at the centre.
keywords: Jain vegetarian birthday cake northwest Sydney
